name: PULMONARY ARTERY
definition: systemic pulmonary supply via aortic branches
dominant_finding: diminished flow on left side (hypoplastic / stenotic pulmonary artery in 40%)
discriminating_features: diminished flow on left side (hypoplastic / stenotic pulmonary artery in 40%)
diminished / increased blood flow to either lung
increased flow to left lung ← jet phenomenon
poststenotic dilatation of trunk + left pulmonary artery

general: diminished flow on left side (hypoplastic / stenotic pulmonary artery in 40%)
diminished / increased blood flow to either lung
increased flow to left lung ← jet phenomenon
poststenotic dilatation of trunk + left pulmonary artery
